retrieved_result: Watch It! 4th of July LINEUP ANNOUNCED! Lady Antebellum, Chris Janson, Lucie Silvas, Shannon Sanders, and the Nashville Symphony will play Nashville's July 4th celebration this summer! It's the best in the country with incredible live music, tons of family fun, and one of the largest fireworks shows in the US
Decision_Reason: The retrieved page is about a July 4th lineup and fireworks, not DIY room decoration ideas; it is not relevant to the query.
